headline: Salesforce’s Anthropic Stake Reportedly Reaches $5 Billion as AI Startup Eyes IPO, Bloomberg Reports
summary: With a TTM operating cash flow of $15.22 billion, Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is included among the 12 Cash-Rich Stocks to Buy Right Now. On June 1, Bloomberg reported that Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) holds a stake in Anthropic PBC worth about $5 billion. The move came after making a series of investments in the fast-growing AI startup. According […]

headline: Salesforce m3ter Deal Highlights Shift Toward Usage Based AI Revenue
summary: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) announced the acquisition of m3ter, a consumption-based metering and billing platform. The company plans to integrate m3ter into Agentforce Revenue Management to support usage-based pricing for AI-focused products and services. The deal highlights Salesforce's push to support customers that want to link software spend more directly to real-time usage. For Salesforce, best known for its subscription-based customer relationship management tools, this move reflects...
